LanguageData.romance.label: Romance & dating
LanguageData.romance.instruction: a spark between two people—an advance, a stolen glance, a whispered promise, or a heart breaking
LanguageData.romance.instructions.0: romance — write it through the body: the gap closing, a touch that hesitates, a hand pulled away
LanguageData.romance.instructions.1: romance — write it through the thought behind the eyes: what they wanted to say, what they almost admitted
LanguageData.romance.instructions.2: romance — write the half-second after: the held breath, the read of the other face, what now sits between them
LanguageData.romance_relation.label: Romance milestones
LanguageData.romance_relation.instruction: a relationship becoming official, formalized, or broken; center the change between the two people without treating it like a chat log
LanguageData.recruit.label: Recruitment & prison
LanguageData.recruit.instruction: the dance of captor and captive—building rapport, breaking will, or planting seeds of rebellion
LanguageData.slavery.label: Slavery
LanguageData.slavery.instruction: the weight of chains—suppression by an overseer or the first spark of defiance
LanguageData.conversion.label: Ideology & conversion
LanguageData.conversion.instruction: a battle of belief—conversion, counseling, preaching, or the pressure of faith on faith
LanguageData.trial.label: Trials & accusations
LanguageData.trial.instruction: the weight of judgment—an accusation hurled, a defense mounted, before watching eyes
LanguageData.strangechat.label: Strange chat
LanguageData.strangechat.instruction: something wrong in ordinary conversation--a strange chat that leaves unease lingering. Don't explain it away
LanguageData.strangechat.tone: with creeping dread; never resolve the wrongness
LanguageData.anomaly.label: Anomaly & dark
LanguageData.anomaly.instruction: something wrong—an unsettling exchange that leaves unease lingering. Don't explain it away
LanguageData.anomaly.tone: with crawling, skin-prickling wrongness; never explain it
LanguageData.insults.label: Insults & fights
LanguageData.insults.instruction: the sting of contempt—an insult, a slight, or fists about to fly
LanguageData.insults.instructions.0: an insult or slight — write the words landing: what was said, the tone, the flinch it drew
LanguageData.insults.instructions.1: an insult or slight — write it through the body: the flush, the clenched jaw, the half-step forward
LanguageData.insults.instructions.2: an insult or slight — write the room: who heard it, who looked away, the silence that came after
LanguageData.ritual.label: Rituals & speeches
LanguageData.ritual.instruction: a solemn public moment—ritual, ceremony, or address. The colony watches
LanguageData.animal.label: Animal handling
LanguageData.animal.instruction: a quiet bond—chatting with an animal, taming, training, or letting one go
LanguageData.heartfelt.label: Heartfelt talk
LanguageData.heartfelt.instruction: warmth exchanged—a deep talk, kind words, or a gentle hand steadying someone
LanguageData.teaching.label: Teaching & lessons
LanguageData.teaching.instruction: a lesson passed down—an adult teaching or playing with a child
LanguageData.smalltalk.label: Small talk
LanguageData.smalltalk.instruction: idle chatter—low-stakes small talk that fills the silence
LanguageData.smalltalk.instructions.0: small talk — write it through the trivial thing itself: the weather, the food, the half-formed opinion
LanguageData.smalltalk.instructions.1: small talk — write the thing underneath it: the ease, the awkwardness, the feeling never named out loud
LanguageData.smalltalk.instructions.2: small talk — write it as rhythm: the back-and-forth, the pauses, the nothing that passes the time
LanguageData.dayreflection.label: Day's reflection
LanguageData.dayreflection.instruction: a quiet end-of-day reflection looking back on the whole day
LanguageData.dayreflection.tone: with a quiet, settling, end-of-day calm
LanguageData.arrival.label: Arrival
LanguageData.other.label: A quiet day
LanguageData.other.instruction: a social interaction between the pawns
LanguageData.socialfight.label: Social fights
LanguageData.socialfight.instruction: tempers snapped—two people came to blows. Write it as heat and impact
LanguageData.insultspree.label: Insult sprees
LanguageData.insultspree.instruction: a pawn breaking into repeated verbal cruelty; prefer the actual insult log entries when they are recorded
LanguageData.mentalbreak.label: Mental breaks
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instruction: the mind breaking—write the pawn's inner storm and what they did
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instructions.0: a mental break — write the spiral: the thought that wouldn't stop, the logic that bent, the pressure that won
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instructions.1: a mental break — write it through the body: the hands, the wandering feet, the thing done without deciding
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instructions.2: a mental break — write the senses going wrong: noise too loud, edges too sharp, the world at a wrong angle
LanguageData.talecombat.label: Combat, injuries & death
LanguageData.talecombat.instruction: blood and danger—combat, injury, death, or rescue. Write what it felt like to live through it
LanguageData.talecombat.instructions.0: combat, injury, or rescue — open on sound: the alarm, the crack, the screaming, the silence after
LanguageData.talecombat.instructions.1: combat, injury, or rescue — open on the body's impact: the blow, the heat, the wet, the limb that won't answer
LanguageData.talecombat.instructions.2: combat, injury, or rescue — open on the other: the face across the gap, the hand that pulled you clear, the body that fell
LanguageData.talehealth.label: Health & medicine
LanguageData.talehealth.instruction: the body's fragility—surgery, illness, exposure, or recovery. Write fear, relief, or trust
LanguageData.talelife.label: Life milestones
LanguageData.talelife.instruction: a turning point—birth, capture, bonding, or a new beginning. Write it as a life changed
LanguageData.talelife.tone: with the quiet weight of a turning point
LanguageData.talequality.label: Masterworks & legendary crafts
LanguageData.talequality.instruction: hands that made something lasting—pride, exhaustion, and the weight of creation
LanguageData.talework.label: Work & achievements
LanguageData.talework.instruction: the satisfaction of labor—craft, study, mining, or a skill grown. Keep it proud but grounded
LanguageData.taleanomaly.label: Anomaly horror
LanguageData.taleanomaly.instruction: dread and the unknown—anomaly, mutation, void contact. Write unease without explaining it
LanguageData.taleanomaly.tone: with dread and the uncanny; leave it unexplained
LanguageData.taleincident.label: Raids, disasters & colony events
LanguageData.taleincident.instruction: the colony shaken—raid, disaster, or crisis. Write what it felt like to live through it
LanguageData.talequiet.label: Quiet personal moments
LanguageData.talequiet.instruction: a quiet aside—recreation, prayer, or small embarrassment. Brief and personal
LanguageData.taleother.label: A notable day
LanguageData.taleother.instruction: a notable non-social RimWorld tale involving the pawn
LanguageData.moodeventPositive.label: Positive mood events
LanguageData.moodeventPositive.instruction: something lifted—a positive colony-wide event that eases the heart
LanguageData.moodeventNegative.label: Negative mood events
LanguageData.moodeventNegative.instruction: something weighing—a negative colony-wide event that strains the spirit
LanguageData.moodeventMixed.label: Situationally mixed mood events
LanguageData.moodeventMixed.instruction: a condition that touches each person differently—write how it feels to this pawn
LanguageData.moodeventOther.label: Passing moods
LanguageData.moodeventOther.instruction: a colony-wide event affecting the pawn's mood
LanguageData.thoughtPregnancyFamily.label: Pregnancy memories
LanguageData.thoughtPregnancyFamily.instruction: pregnancy, birth loss, or the end of a pregnancy as intimate family news; write with restraint and do not assume the pawn feels only one simple emotion
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.label: Positive thoughts
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instruction: a fleeting lift in spirits—a positive thought that brightened the day. Match the intensity to the mood effect: minor joys get a quiet note, strong ones get warmth and detail
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instructions.0: a positive thought — write what sparked it: the small thing seen, heard, or remembered. Scale it to the mood lift
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instructions.1: a positive thought — write the body easing: shoulders, breath, the half-smile nobody saw. Scale it to the mood lift
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instructions.2: a positive thought — write the want it stirs: the pull to keep this, do it again, tell someone. Scale it to the mood lift
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.label: Negative thoughts
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instruction: a weight on the mind—a negative thought that lingered. Match the intensity to the mood effect: minor irritations get a passing mention, severe ones get raw emotion and weight
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instructions.0: a negative thought — write what sparked it: the small sting, the line that repeated. Scale it to the mood hit
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instructions.1: a negative thought — write the body tightening: jaw, gut, the restless hands. Scale it to the mood hit
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instructions.2: a negative thought — write the loop it makes: coming back, growing, the angle it won't drop. Scale it to the mood hit
LanguageData.thoughtOther.label: Passing thoughts
LanguageData.thoughtOther.instruction: a temporary thought that crossed the pawn's mind. Match the intensity to the mood effect
LanguageData.inspiration.label: Inspirations
LanguageData.inspiration.instruction: a sudden useful clarity—write the pawn's mind catching fire with purpose, grounded in the specific kind of inspiration and any reason the game gives
LanguageData.workDarkStudy.label: Dark study work
LanguageData.workDarkStudy.instruction: dark research that should feel unsettling every time—write the work as intimate contact with something wrong; keep it spooky, sensory, and unresolved
LanguageData.workPassion.label: Passionate work
LanguageData.workPassion.instruction: work that touches one of the pawn's passions—positive, focused, quietly satisfying, without pretending the colony is easy
LanguageData.workStrain.label: Straining work
LanguageData.workStrain.instruction: work that feels dull, grimy, clumsy, or frustrating—negative when it is cleaning/dumb labor or when the pawn lacks skill
LanguageData.workRoutine.label: Routine work
LanguageData.workRoutine.instruction: ordinary colony work with no strong passion or failure signal—neutral, practical, brief, and grounded in the texture of the task
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.label: Pregnancy
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.instruction: pregnancy as a life-changing beginning; write the pawn noticing the body, future, fear, hope, or uncertainty without assuming joy
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.tone: with intimate uncertainty and quiet weight
LanguageData.hediffLabor.label: Labor
LanguageData.hediffLabor.instruction: labor and birth approaching; write urgency, pain, fear, care, and the threshold before birth without skipping ahead to the baby unless supplied
LanguageData.hediffMajorHealth.label: Major health changes
LanguageData.hediffMajorHealth.instruction: a new or worsening health condition that stayed with the pawn through the day
LanguageData.raid.label: Raids
LanguageData.raid.instruction: the colony under attack—violence, fear, and the desperate scramble to survive. Write what it felt like to live through it
LanguageData.raid.instructions.0: the colony under attack — open on the space: the door, the cover, the gap they'll come through
LanguageData.raid.instructions.1: the colony under attack — open on the body: the sprint, the breath, the fumble for the weapon
LanguageData.raid.instructions.2: the colony under attack — open on the aftermath: the smoke, the blood on the floor, who isn't answering
